sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import { useGame, formatSalary, ovrColor } from '../hooks/useGameState'; export default function Dashboard() { const { gameState, simulateGame } = useGame(); const { team, gmName, wins, losses, season, roster, schedule, budget, morale, chemistry, notifications } = gameState; const recentGames = schedule.filter(g => g.played).slice(-5).reverse(); const upcomingGames = schedule.filter(g => !g.played).slice(0, 5); const topPlayers = [...roster].sort((a, b) => b.ovr - a.ovr).slice(0, 5); const winPct = wins + losses > 0 ? ((wins / (wins + losses)) * 100).toFixed(1) : '—'; const avgOvr = roster.length ? Math.round(roster.reduce((s, p) => s + p.ovr, 0) / roster.length) : 0; return (

{team.name} Dashboard

GM: {gmName} · {season}–{season + 1} Season

Record
{wins}–{losses}
Win% {winPct}
Team OVR
{avgOvr}
{roster.length} players on roster
Cap Space
{formatSalary(budget)}
of $150M cap
Morale
= 70 ? 'var(--green)' : morale >= 50 ? 'var(--orange)' : 'var(--red)' }}>{morale}
Team chemistry: {chemistry}
{/* Recent Results */}
Recent Results
{recentGames.length === 0 ? (

Season hasn't started yet. Click "Sim Next Game"!

) : ( {recentGames.map(g => ( ))}
DateOpponentScoreW/L
{g.date} {g.isHome ? '' : '@ '}{g.opponent} {g.score.us}–{g.score.them} {g.won ? 'W' : 'L'}
)}
{/* Upcoming Games */}
Up Next
{upcomingGames.map((g, i) => ( ))}
DateOpponentH/A
{g.date} {g.opponent} {g.isHome ? 'HOME' : 'AWAY'}
{/* Top Players */}
Top Players
{topPlayers.map((p, i) => ( ))}
#PlayerPosOVRPOTAgePPGRPGAPGSalary
{i + 1} {p.firstName} {p.lastName} {p.pos} {p.ovr} {p.pot} {p.age} {p.ppg} {p.rpg} {p.apg} {formatSalary(p.salary)}
{/* Recent Notifications */}
Activity Feed
{notifications.slice(0, 6).map(n => (
{n.text}
))}
); }
